{{nihongo|'''Watatsumino Shrine'''|和多都美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

{{nihongo|'''Watatsumino Shrine'''|和多都美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].

== instance of (P31) ==

{{nihongo|'''Watatsumino Shrine'''|和多都美神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Tsushima]].
